productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Washed Blue Skirt
description: CompositionWashed blue denim skirt made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front with one patch pocket on the right side, two patch pockets at the back, elasticated waist band with belt loops, contrast stitched detailing, slit on the hem at the back, metal zipper and button closure and brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the backFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryHer cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little girl in this skirt from gini and jony. The shorts and box pleats mean she can move around easily, while the fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with a T-shirt or a girly top and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
